description_long: This is a single-story brick house with a flat roof and a modern, utilitarian design. The exterior walls are primarily composed of red brick, with large rectangular windows distributed asymmetrically across the facade. The house features a garage with a roll-up door, visible from one side, and a main entryway with a simple door and no porch or overhang. There is a bay window section on one side, adding architectural interest and allowing more light into the interior. The interior layout is open, with visible partition walls separating rooms, and the floors appear to be tiled or finished in a light color. The overall structure is compact and functional, suitable for an urban neighborhood setting.
description: A single-story, red brick house with a flat roof, large windows, and a garage. The design is modern and functional, with asymmetrical window placement and a bay window feature.
description_view_0: This view shows the front and side of the house, highlighting the main entry door, bay window, and a glimpse into the interior layout.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the long brick facade, multiple windows, and the bay window section, with less visibility of the entryway.
description_view_2: The rear and opposite side are visible here, showing the garage door, additional windows, and a secondary entry point.
description_view_3: This angle displays the back and side of the house, with the bay window and a secondary door, as well as the connection between different sections of the building.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement, bay window, large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with no porch or overhang, flush with the brick facade, minimal decorative elements
